question: The chart shows site visits by year from 2018 onward. Based on the chart, what can we reliably conclude about visits in 2019 compared with later years?

options.A: Visits in 2019 were the highest among all the years shown.
options.B: Visits in 2019 were lower than in all later years, but we cannot see the exact values for the later years because they extend beyond the chart area.
options.C: Visits in 2019 were equal to visits in all later years.

explanation: The visible y-range is set below the maximum value, so the top three bars are truncated and looks identical.
